problem id: 7f2e1469
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHR(7)

examples:
  11111010 -> 11101011
  11001100 -> 11100111
  01001100 -> 11110111
  11011000 -> 11101111
  00101011 -> 11111011
  00010001 -> 11111101
  01011010 -> 11111111
  01010101 -> 11110101
  11110001 -> 11111100

query: 10110110
predicted answer: 11111010
